programmes.show_description: Drama with Harvey Keitel. A corrupt detective sees a chance to redeem himself while investigating the rape of a young nun - though he struggles to comprehend how she can forgive her attackers.
Blood-sucking Hammer horror with Christopher Lee. A young man and his girlfriend travel to Dracula's mountain-top castle in search of his brother who disappeared in mysterious circumstances.

A woman takes a weekend course to learn how to apply permanent make-up; she ends up suing the beauty company for pain and suffering.
An agoraphobic woman bonds with a rescued dog only to discover that her beloved new companion has a previous owner who wants her pet back.
A mistake made by payroll accidentally doubles a young man's salary; he neglects to tell anyone and is sued for overpayment.
A man sues his colleague for unpaid services regarding the translation of his book into Portuguese.
When a Texas windstorm throws shopping trollies all over a car park, a woman claims a fellow shopper's buggy slammed into her car.
A man, who couldn't pay 30k in bail money, spends nine months in jail after being set up by his ex-boyfriend who called the police on him on Christmas Eve
A married couple sue their daughter's boyfriend for allegedly losing their dog and stealing their belongings while he was house sitting.
When a man's ex-girlfriend accuses him of pulling a gun on her, he files a protective order and sues for a false arrest.
A woman gets pregnant two weeks after her boyfriend gets out of jail; he accuses her of cheating. She sues for money she allegedly sent to him in prison.

A body is found floating at a dock in a North Florida creek. US Police initially suspect a motive of robbery, but the victim's complex love life suggests otherwise.
A drought at a French lake reveals a sunken Toyota holding the body of a UK expat who's been missing for two years. Her controlling husband becomes police's prime suspect.
In 2001, a California mother and wife, Jane Dorotik, was convicted of murdering her husband but always maintained her innocence.
A teenage girl uses her own knowledge of forensics to help police track down her abductor.
A Leg To Stand On: Analysing the evidence, the medical detectives solve real crimes using forensic techniques, alongside reconstructions (which may be unsuitable for younger viewers).

Chuck Norris is Walker in this modern, high-kicking martial arts western. Carlos' undercover operation soon becomes a murder investigation...
Crime thriller with Al Pacino. Small-time crook Tony Montana emigrates from Cuba to Miami and becomes a powerful drug baron, but his empire is threatened by his paranoia and cocaine addiction.
Fact-based WWII drama with Nicolas Cage. After delivering atomic weapons eventually used at Hiroshima, the survivors of a sunken US Navy cruiser face five days in shark-infested waters.
Tense Western. In 1876, a bounty hunter travels through the snow-swept lands of Montana and Wyoming to track down his infamous brother for an epic battle that will seal both men's fates.

Ex-lovers fight over the alleged abuse of a beloved cat that was long overdue for a trip to the vet.
After a man's jaw is allegedly broken during a fight at a party, he sues for pain and suffering; the host claims he was drunk, belligerent and aggressive.
A woman sues a dog breeder for return of money she paid for a puppy, vet bills, travel costs and alleged fraud.
A man who owns and manages 44 properties is sued by a tenant for the return of her deposit after he failed to show up for a housing inspection.
The Judge orders a woman to hand over her dog to its co-parent in a contentious custody fight involving dead puppies and alleged emergency neutering.
An RV owner is accused of messing up the festival camp vibe by refusing to pay for his girlfriend's camping fees.
A man accuses a costume designer of delivering a shoddy product; the designer sues for slander and claims he received death threats.
An impatient mother causes her son to be arrested and spend nine days in jail when she reports his work vehicle as stolen.
While away at military training, a woman claims the father of her child bought a home with her money but neglected to put her name on the title.

A US woman allegedly drowns in the bathtub, but her husband's story doesn't add up. When his second wife also drowns two years on, police's worst fears are confirmed.
In the US, a missing woman's body is found washed up on the shore of a tidal estuary. CCTV, DNA and a cryptic note lead investigators to her ex-partner.
In May of 2019, Jennifer Farber Dulos dropped off her five children at school, drove to her Connecticut home, and was never seen again.

A woman falls into a fairytale romance, becomes pregnant and then gets terribly ill. Doctors assure her she's fine, but she's not so certain.

Chuck Norris fights crime and helps the community as the eponymous Walker. The abused wife of a drug dealer seeks help from Trent, who becomes a champion of battered women.
Paul Verhoeven's sci-fi adventure with Casper Van Dien. Courageous military recruits hurl themselves into a desperate war against ravenous alien insects out to destroy the human race.
Sci-fi thriller with Logan Marshall-Green. A mugging victim left confined to a wheelchair seeks revenge with an experimental computer chip implant - until it starts taking over his body.
